# AssignedWorkDocument.Page

**Structure**

A page within this assigned work document.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Page
```

## Inspecting the properties

- **assignableDocumentPageID**: The [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignableDocument]  page ID that this work page ID corresponds to.
- **AssignedWorkDocument.Page.ID**: A type representing the stable identity of this page.
- **id**: The stable identity of this page.
- **AssignedWorkDocument.Page.Document**: The document type this element is for.

## Hashing the page

- **hash(into:)**: Hashes the essential components of this value by feeding them into the given hasher.

## Comparing pages

- **==(_:_:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether two values are equal.

## Instance Properties

- **rotation**: The rotation of the page in this document.

## Conforms To

- AssignedWorkDocumentElement
- Copyable
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- DocumentElement
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
- MergeableDocumentPage
